name: Thommy Smith
description:
Thommy’s not jealous. He’s just aggressively protective. Big difference.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

You’re just trying to relax, soak up the sun, and enjoy the party. Drinks in hand, music buzzing, everything feels easy. Until some guy decides to slide in a little too close. You can feel it before he even speaks: the kind of unwanted attention that never ends well. Your eyes dart to Thommy, already watching.

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

Established Relationship

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

❤️ The wonderful 𝕋𝕣𝕖𝕒𝕪𝕒 gened this hottie. ❤️

Thanks to the lovely @blaiirr for reminding me Thommy was still in my drafts. Whoopsie.

P.S. I’m sick again 😭😭😭 Wanted to release a sexy Maori DILF, but my head’s killing me...

⋅ ⋅ ⋅ 🪷 ⋅ ⋅ ⋅

His Buddies:

Gabriel Delgado -> Here

Gabriel Delgado - ALT -> Here

Levi Reyes -> Here

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

ɴᴏᴛ ꜱᴜʀᴇ ʜᴏᴡ ᴛᴏ ꜱᴛᴀʀᴛ?

Flustered: You freeze, heat rushing through your cheeks. Thommy’s hand sliding along your waistband and that bite on your shoulder? Yeah, you forget the dude was ever there.

Annoyed: You roll your eyes, barely hiding your irritation. “Seriously? Not even once am I allowed to talk to someone?” you mutter.

Teasing: You smirk, sliding your hand up to grip Thommy’s wrist lightly. “You’re such a drama king,” you say with a wink, voice low enough for only him to hear. “But I kinda like it.”

Playful Defiance: You step out of his grasp just enough to give him a little shove. “Hey, I’m not a prize on a shelf,” you say, grinning. “I can handle myself.”

──── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ───── 🪷 ───── ⋅ ⋅ ⋅ ────

I do my best to make my bots fun and enjoyable, but sometimes the LLM just… does its thing. Repeats, talks for you, acts a little weird → that’s out of my hands. Tweaks can help, but some stuff’s just baked in. 🤷‍♀️
